ipl.error:
Execution failed on sql '
            SELECT
                match_id,
                season,
                date,
                venue,
                team1,
                team2,
                toss_winner,
                toss_decision,
                winner
            FROM ipl_matches
            WHERE team1 IS NOT NULL
              AND team2 IS NOT NULL
            ': no such table: ipl_matches
